scope.selection_reason: All assigned rows are marked manual_compact_korean_layout in the historical manifest. The compact text is not trusted as a semantic baseline; each row is compared with direct PC JP/EN/SC/TC and the pre-compaction Korean source before a four-line Static Patch 007 reflow is proposed.

layout_policy.baseline: Static Patch 007 verified PK event-dialogue layout
layout_policy.japanese_line_break_policy: Direct Japanese line breaks are semantic witnesses only. Korean line breaks are authored independently at Korean sentence or clause boundaries.
layout_policy.dynamic_token_policy: Each dynamic token line reserves the manifest raw full-name width and reports ceil(raw * 30 / 48); runtime_proven stays false.

CB야마노우치 우에스기가CZ, CB오기가야쓰 우에스기가CZ, CB고가 아시카가가CZ가
일제히 봉기해 CC가와고에성CZ을 포위한 것이다.

source_evidence.jp:
CA義元CZの調略により、
CB山内上杉家CZ、CB扇谷上杉家CZ、CB古河足利家CZが
一斉に蜂起し、CC河越城CZを包囲したのである。
source_evidence.en: In line with CAYoshimotoCZÖs plan, the CBYamanouchi UesugiCZ, CB¥gigayatsu UesugiCZ, and CBKoga AshikagaCZ Clans rose up simultaneously to besiege CCKawagoe CastleCZ.

由于CA义元CZ的谋略，
CB山内上杉家CZ、CB扇谷上杉家CZ以及CB古河足利家CZ

在CA義元CZ的謀略之下，
CB山內上杉家CZ、CB扇谷上杉家CZ以及CB古河足利家CZ
